title: Steam eternity
description: A small mod pack in which you develop from the steam-powered mechanisms of the Create mods to the high-tech Draconic Evolution mod.
body:
Embark on an epic, progression-based journey that will take you from the humble beginnings of mechanical power to mastering the primordial, god-like energy of dragons themselves. This expert-level modpack is designed for those who seek a satisfying, long-term challenge where every achievement feels earned and every technological breakthrough opens up new, exciting possibilities.

🚀 The Age of Invention: Create
Your journey begins in the steam-powered era of Create. Here, you will learn the fundamentals of engineering and kinetic energy. You'll start with simple water wheels and windmills, mastering the art of rotational force to power your first automated farms, ore processing lines, and complex mechanical contraptions. This stage is not just about resources; it's about developing an engineer's mindset—learning to think creatively to solve problems with gears, belts, and clever design. The skills you hone here in patience and spatial reasoning will be the bedrock of your entire technological empire.

⚡ The Industrial Revolution: Mekanism & Beyond
Once you have mastered the mechanical, you will unlock the power of the atomic age with Mekanism. This is your leap from kinetic force to raw, industrial electricity. Prepare to dive deep into complex chemical processes, 5x ore multiplication, and scalable power generation. You will progress from basic solar panels and wind generators to blazing Gas-Burning Generators and, ultimately, the pinnacle of engineering: a stable Fusion Reactor. This phase is about scaling up, optimizing, and building the immense power infrastructure needed for what comes next.

🔬 The Pinnacle of Power: Draconic Evolution
Your technological ascent culminates with Draconic Evolution. Having harnessed the power of fusion, you will now learn to wield the chaotic, overwhelming power of a dragon's heart. This is endgame content in its truest form. Craft armor and tools of unimaginable strength that make you nearly invincible. Construct the colossal Draconic Reactor, a multi-block structure of terrifying power that requires constant monitoring to prevent a cataclysmic meltdown. Build Draconic Energy Cores capable of storing billions, even trillions, of RF to fuel your world-altering projects. This is no longer just about survival or automation; it's about achieving a state of near-godhood.

🌍 Key Features of the Pack:

Curated Progression: A carefully designed tech tree ensures a logical and rewarding flow from mechanical to cosmic power. You cannot skip steps; you must earn every tier of technology.

Seamless Integration: The mods are configured to work together, creating a unified experience where one tier naturally leads into the next.

Exploration & Adventure: Enhanced by mods like Alex's Mobs, Deeper and Darker, and Ad Astra, the world is filled with new dimensions, challenging bosses, and exotic creatures to discover. Your powerful gear will be tested.

Deep Automation: From Create's simple deployers to Refined Storage's digital network and sophisticated farming with Farmer's Delight, you are encouraged to automate everything.

Quality of Life: Pack includes essential client-side mods like Jade, JourneyMap, and sophisticated storage options to keep your focus on the grand engineering challenges.

🎯 This pack is perfect for players who:

Love long, intricate tech trees with a clear sense of advancement.

Find satisfaction in building complex, large-scale factories and systems.

Enjoy the challenge of managing immense power generation and storage.

Want to work towards a truly powerful and rewarding endgame.

Believe that the journey is just as important as the destination.
